# 2026-05-02 — Ridgeline Loop

Clear and cold at the trailhead, warming fast. Walked the
[Ridgeline Loop](../trails/ridgeline-loop.md) counter-clockwise.

## Seen

- [Eastern Bluebird](../species/birds/eastern-bluebird.md) — a pair on the
  fenceline at the first meadow. First of the year.
- [Trout Lily](../species/plants/trout-lily.md) — carpets of them in the shade
  below the ridge.

## Notes

The new [boots](../gear/boots-review.md) held up on the scree. Back to the
[home note](../index.md).
